title: acer obtusatum var. coriaceum
intro: Acer obtusatum var. coriaceum, also known as the Korean maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acer obtusatum var. coriaceum include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as possessing antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
